all.en: We are excited to announce our summer internship program for university students.
all.zh: 我們很興奮地宣布針對大學生開放的暑期實習計畫。

all.en: The program will run from early June through late August of next year.
all.zh: 計畫將自明年六月初進行至八月底。

all.en: Internships are available across engineering, marketing, finance, and design teams.
all.zh: 實習職缺涵蓋工程、行銷、財務及設計各團隊。

all.en: We plan to welcome approximately forty interns to our headquarters this season.
all.zh: 本季預計招收約四十位實習生加入總部。

all.en: Additional spots will be available at our regional offices in Taipei and Tokyo.
all.zh: 台北及東京區域辦公室亦提供額外名額。

all.en: Applicants must be currently enrolled in an accredited four-year university program.
all.zh: 申請者須為立案四年制大學在學學生。

all.en: We welcome students entering their junior or senior year by next September.
all.zh: 我們歡迎於明年九月升上大三或大四的學生。

all.en: Graduate students pursuing technical degrees are also eligible to apply.
all.zh: 攻讀技術領域的研究生亦符合申請資格。

all.en: Each intern will be paired with a dedicated mentor and a buddy from the team.
all.zh: 每位實習生將獲分配一位專屬導師及一位團隊夥伴。

all.en: Mentors are senior employees who guide professional development throughout the summer.
all.zh: 導師為負責整個夏季專業發展指引的資深員工。

all.en: Interns work on real, high-impact projects that ship to production users.
all.zh: 實習生將參與會交付給正式用戶的真實高影響力專案。

all.en: Each intern presents results to senior leadership during the final week.
all.zh: 每位實習生將於最後一週向高階主管發表成果。

all.en: Weekly tech talks and leadership panels are offered throughout the program.
all.zh: 計畫期間每週將舉辦技術講座及領導力座談。

all.en: Social events include team dinners, hiking trips, and a baseball game outing.
all.zh: 社交活動包括團隊聚餐、健行及一場棒球賽外出活動。

all.en: Competitive monthly stipends are paid throughout the duration of the internship.
all.zh: 實習期間將支付具競爭力的月薪津貼。

all.en: We provide housing assistance for interns relocating from outside the city.
all.zh: 我們為自外縣市搬遷的實習生提供住宿協助。

all.en: Free meals are available at the cafeteria during all working days.
all.zh: 所有工作日均可於員工餐廳免費用餐。

all.en: A daily commute subsidy covers public transportation within the metro area.
all.zh: 每日通勤補貼涵蓋都會區範圍內的大眾運輸。

all.en: Top performers may receive a full-time offer prior to the program ending.
all.zh: 表現傑出者可於計畫結束前獲得正職錄取通知。

all.en: Application materials include a resume, transcript, and short personal statement.
all.zh: 申請文件包含履歷、成績單及一份簡短自傳。

all.en: An optional video introduction may be submitted to support your application.
all.zh: 可選擇性繳交影音自我介紹以強化申請。

all.en: The application deadline is the last day of February next year.
all.zh: 申請截止日為明年二月最後一日。

all.en: Interviews will be conducted virtually during March and early April.
all.zh: 面試將於三月至四月初以線上方式進行。

all.en: We strongly encourage students from underrepresented backgrounds to apply.
all.zh: 我們強烈鼓勵代表性不足背景的學生踴躍申請。

all.en: Final decisions will be communicated to all applicants by the end of April.
all.zh: 最終結果將於四月底前通知所有申請者。

all.en: Selected interns will receive a comprehensive welcome package before arrival.
all.zh: 獲選實習生將於報到前收到完整的歡迎包。

all.en: The first week features orientation, team introductions, and technical setup.
all.zh: 第一週包含新人訓練、團隊介紹及技術環境設置。

all.en: Each intern receives a laptop and necessary equipment on the first day.
all.zh: 每位實習生於第一天領取筆電及必要設備。

all.en: A mid program review evaluates progress and identifies adjustments needed.
all.zh: 計畫期中檢視評估進度並確認所需調整。

all.en: Visiting executive sessions give interns direct access to senior leadership.
all.zh: 高階主管座談讓實習生直接接觸資深領導者。

all.en: Alumni network membership provides ongoing career support after the program ends.
all.zh: 結業後實習生可加入校友網絡持續獲得職涯支援。

all.en: Hiring conversion rates from internship to full time have exceeded sixty percent.
all.zh: 實習轉正職的錄取率已超過百分之六十。

all.en: Returning interns may apply for accelerated onboarding upon graduation.
all.zh: 返聘實習生畢業後可申請加速報到流程。

all.en: We are proud to invest in the next generation of industry talent.
all.zh: 我們以投資產業下一代人才為榮。

all.en: Intern projects are scoped to deliver tangible results within twelve weeks.
all.zh: 實習專案範圍以於十二週內交付具體成果為原則。

all.en: Each project includes clear success criteria and milestone checkpoints.
all.zh: 每項專案皆訂有明確的成功標準與里程碑檢核點。

all.en: Cross functional collaboration helps interns understand the broader business context.
all.zh: 跨職能合作協助實習生了解更宏觀的業務背景。

all.en: Weekly one on one meetings with mentors track progress and provide guidance.
all.zh: 每週與導師的一對一會議追蹤進度並提供指引。

all.en: Mid program performance feedback identifies strengths and growth opportunities.
all.zh: 計畫期中績效回饋指出強項與成長機會。

all.en: Final presentations are recorded and shared with senior leadership for review.
all.zh: 結業簡報將錄影並分享給高階主管審視。

all.en: Networking lunches connect interns with leaders across the entire organization.
all.zh: 交流午餐讓實習生與整個組織的領導者建立連結。

all.en: Resume workshops prepare interns for full time job searches upon graduation.
all.zh: 履歷工作坊為實習生畢業後的正職求職做好準備。

all.en: Mock interview sessions help interns build confidence for future opportunities.
all.zh: 模擬面試課程協助實習生為未來機會建立信心。

all.en: Program feedback collected at the end shapes improvements for the following year.
all.zh: 計畫結束時蒐集的回饋形塑次年的改善方向。

all.en: Honestly, last summer one intern admitted she had practiced her introduction in the bathroom mirror that morning.
all.zh: 說真的，去年夏天有位實習生坦白她當天早上在廁所鏡子前練習了自我介紹。

all.en: Our team's longest running tradition is treating new interns to bubble tea on their second Friday.
all.zh: 我們團隊維持最久的傳統，就是在實習生第二週週五請他們喝珍珠奶茶。

all.en: I still remember the panic I felt during my own first standup meeting as a college intern years ago.
all.zh: 多年前我自己還是大學實習生時，第一次參加每日站立會議的緊張感至今仍歷歷在目。

all.en: Last August one intern's final presentation moved her mentor so much that he sent it to his own father.
all.zh: 去年八月一位實習生的結業簡報讓她導師感動到把影片寄給了自己的父親看。

all.en: Honestly, the questions interns ask in week three often expose blind spots full-time engineers have stopped noticing.
all.zh: 說真的，實習生第三週問的問題，往往揭露了正職工程師早已習以為常的盲點。

all.en: Our director keeps every farewell card she ever received from interns in a shoebox under her desk.
all.zh: 我們總監把歷年來實習生送的每張告別卡都收在桌底下的一個鞋盒裡。

all.en: Last year's baseball outing got rained out, so the team ordered pizza in the office and played board games instead.
all.zh: 去年的棒球賽外出活動被雨打亂，團隊改在辦公室叫披薩、玩桌遊。

all.en: I personally believe the best mentors share their own past failures rather than only their proud wins.
all.zh: 我個人相信最好的導師會分享自己過去的失敗，而不只是亮眼的成功經歷。

all.en: Looking back, the interns who asked the most questions were almost always the ones who returned full time later.
all.zh: 回頭看，那些問最多問題的實習生，後來幾乎都回來成為正職。

all.en: Tomorrow I plan to introduce my new intern to the office plants before the actual onboarding paperwork begins.
all.zh: 明天我打算在開始辦正式報到手續前，先帶我的新實習生認識辦公室裡的盆栽。
